$comment: FC17.9(i) (D-CSUBSET-INLINE-ASM): witnesses the empty-template `__asm__ volatile("")` optimizer barrier end-to-end. The `__asm__` keyword lexes, the asmStmt rule parses, the empty template is accepted at semantic (a non-empty one would fail loud S_InlineAsmNonEmptyTemplate/S0057), the InlineAsm HIR leaf lowers to a zero-operand side-effecting MirOpcode::CompilerBarrier that emits no instruction, and the program stores/loads a global around two barriers and returns 42. A single-threaded binary cannot observe compiler reordering, so 42 witnesses the compile+run chain including under the `release` optimizer pipeline (the barrier survives DCE/CSE/LICM). The ordering contract (no load hoisted across the fence) is pinned in the MIR tests where it is observable; the asm->barrier link is pinned in test_mir_lowering_c_subset (a Skip-mapping would pass this exit-code test while silently dropping the barrier). AGNOSTIC: `__asm__` is pure syntax and CompilerBarrier lowers to nothing on every target, so all four legs run (no gated header). RED-on-disable: drop the `__asm__` keyword/asmStmt rule (P0001 undeclared) or make the template non-empty (S0057).
